reference: I have had a lump around my anus that is about the size of a ten pence piece. It itches at times and is very painful to sit, bend, and walk. I opened my bowels last night, which resulted in it bleeding. I applied some Germaloids, which eased the pain and made it not so painful, but it is still bleeding onto my underwear, and it has not gone down in size. I have no fever and no other pain anywhere else. What could this be?
text: I have had a lump around my anus that is about the size of a ten-pence piece. It itches at times and is very painful to sit, bend, and walk. I opened my bowels last week, which resulted in it bleeding. I applied some dermaloids, which eased the pain and made it not so painful, but it is still bleeding onto my underwear, and it has not gone down in size. I have no fever and no other pain anywhere else. What could this be?
